Axar Patel Confident: Preparation &amp; Focus Ahead of South Africa Test

Axar Patel Confident: Preparation & Focus Ahead of South Africa Test

India all-rounder Axar Patel has spoken about his renewed focus and preparation ahead of the Test series versus South Africa, saying he feels mentally and physically ready for the challenge.
